sample_selection: citizen == 2 (noncitizens only) with perwt > 0, reported yrimmig and birthyr, and 18 <= age <= 34
yrimmig <= 2007 so that those eligible lived continuously in the United States since 2007
treatment_definition: eligible = birthyr between 1982 and 1996, yrimmig <= birthyr + 15, and yrimmig <= 2007
